h8175e684gb3f0g4368g9d6fg164d33f59850: I'll soon be off to gather your compensation. With your track record, I'm sure you'll find Wulbren in no time - so I'll be quick!
h489fe1abgcd19g4014g9756g8a2340534940: Thank you for agreeing to find Wulbren. It means a great deal to me, indeed.
hf51ce09ag34d8g4f76ga61agf6884e30365f: If anything's happened to Wulbren, someone is going to be very sorry. I'll make sure of that.
hed4ea927g6710g46d0gad52gc737d3d733af: I thank you for the invitation to your camp. It's well-appointed. Not too crowded.
h0bd1f752g8cbdg4d69gb998gf8db15aa4ffb: Perfect for thinking, and I've been doing just that.
h265cef96gdcaeg4916gb2c7g58c15eb8a2b3: Wulbren's family said he wasn't among those brought to Moonrise Towers.
h781a2adag93b2g485aga0cdgbc2ef81dd667: Still, if deep gnomes are being rounded up, it stands to reason he might have been captured elsewhere.
hb60cf268g6559g4c91g9abcg1022d47f2819: I didn't want to believe Wulbren would be in that heart of horrors, but logic is logic...
h5991e6ddg918ag48caga872gdbb649396e8c: I'm destined for Moonrise Towers. I could look for him.
hdf0d67f7gf545g4f0bg87a9g4622c2494976: Hmm. You've done so much already. I'm hesitant to prevail upon you again, but...
hc98f01ceg77fag4495g99ccgf46b48328c1d: I can't risk re-capture. I barely escaped last time.
hdde7e3f2gaf74g4070g9d5age9bd6a066566: You'd do it, then? You'd look for him?
ha4349012g2f9fg41bcg8ba4g6e4174b283fc: That's... very decent of you. Thank you.
hc1c45edag437bg42aaga5fdg6587d933bb7d: Why are you going to such lengths to find this fellow?
hd626398dgd6d6g41d8g84e9g21a71efdfddd: Some people are simply worth it. You understand.
hf93dbc36g99f7g46bdg8231g1c30a97b94c4: Perhaps that's why you've agreed to look for him. I'm lucky - and grateful.
hca4c7311gf99eg4ae9g8ca9g64919e393b74: Pity. Everyone deserves a friend. Even me, apparently.
h10c26a56gb687g440cg9e29g0d432cbb3bc1: Honestly, I can't even remember the last time we spoke.
hca3628cag6d77g4d50gaabagee82a83f5187: Still, some bonds are simply unbreakable. Neither axe nor the ticking bomb of time can sever them.
he206f550gef20g488bg9b6cgf7c96f8eaf12: I am extremely grateful you've offered to look for him.
h381fd6c3g00eag4078gbb14gc520183dcc9b: I don't work for free. Make me an offer.
h4752e026g426dg4aaeg93e7gb30afcf20f5c: Find Wulbren, and you can have anything it is within my power to give.
hab0fd979g3dcbg4307g9a3cg692735defcfb: I'll take some more of those smokepowder bombs.
h5261af87g76e6g4b3cgb997gf1c27cb468b3: Now we're talking! I can whip some up for you, no problem - but I'll need a little time to gather the right supplies.
h7b48888ag0aa5g4f3cg8f2eg927068933038: Oh, this is excellent - I'll get started right away!
h9a26fcbbg57ddg46abga9b5g18bdee881dd6: There's something else I'd like to discuss.
h1bf8335ege2eag4008gb68fge8041432ed07: I... haven't that much on me, I'm afraid. But I'll tell you what: You find Wulbren, and I'll return with exactly that sum.
hb5d96be2g0692g40a6g9e05g87e4037a5448: A very fair trade, I think!
h6fee9cf1gb97ag461eg8b30g54231193100d: Surprise me - but make it good.
h2a368aacg9250g496bgae62g441b33c67630: Aha! I know just the thing. You find Wulbren, and I'll gather the necessary implements.
hb459c5f9g0108g412fga17ega5bd2d6520a6: Trust me - you won't be disappointed.
h4291cfa9g31c5g4136g88degc9c62c22f521: What can you tell me about Moonrise Towers?
h3fe39398g6647g4f41ga395g7848b1ea4718: I haven't been there myself. The area around it is... well. Cursed. Terrifyingly so.
haff7c7afg4342g4b81gacb1ge868644eb84a: I did hear something interesting, though. There are shades that plague the path to the towers - shades that fear not steel, but light.
h297d30a2gc5d9g437egb801gc6a20417664c: Duergar who mentioned it sounded truly traumatised. It was almost amusing.
h890829e4gb8cag45b6g9eaeg7e52faa9e807: I'll let you know if I hear anything - no more, no less.
hced7f830g6b9eg47a8g833bg55505a2bc9bc: I have my own matters to attend to.
he51ff810g4a5bg4f1fgb677gd77feab91161: I'm certain you do. But... if you should find yourself in the Towers, perhaps you'll keep an eye out for him.
hd2402828gd29fg48c6g9b78g1dc25d46e709: Meanwhile, I'll need to think of an alternative. If Wulbren's been captured, I must help him...
h6c6f7263gcdcfg4962gae6dg006b265052fe: Thank you. I think I have a plan. Perhaps I can blast my way in...
hb8d1ff2fg2578g4ae8g8eb8g4de75fb5db2b: Your friend can likely take care of himself.
h8def73cdg9bcag4d86gba36g1061292d7afd: Pah. If only that were true. Wulbren's a good sort, but he wouldn't know his arkayas from his elbow.
h7e094c64gac6fg447bga267g00daf9a6fa10: I wouldn't hold out hope for any gnome taken by drow.
hd2d1f993ge4ffg4d4bgb855g88ccebf420df: I wouldn't hold out hope for any gnome taken by duergar.
hf989ca88g7e8cg4060gb9bbgde7767a693c0: Nor I. Which means quick action is necessary.
h916e9aadg366eg47a9gb5ecgbb4434a19cce: I'm hesitant to prevail upon you again. But... I can't risk re-capture. I'd be no help to Wulbren at all.
h4e58f758gbbabg44d3g8891ga5ec1bc25892: Would you... would you look for him?
h9b5d613bgf93ag4716ga1b0g6ad5a650e7ae: I haven't heard of other deep gnome abductions.
h80172507gde0fg4681g8bf5ga7fb7f9400a5: That is somewhat reassuring. Still, the Towers are my only lead.
h76d2f5bfgd5a8g41c2gad4ag84e5bf61f57d: There's something else I want to discuss.
he853c1f7g7fecg425eg8129ge3f4c19ad0a7: Your smokepowder bombs - are you an alchemist?
h1bd3b04cg5ba5g46f4ga793g187834bfcf53: Alchemist, tinkerer, adventurer, curmudgeon... I wear many hats, most with great enthusiasm.
h17944265ga1a6g4a84gbc62g2a67fa6465c4: Tell me a little more about yourself.
h5e962feag9a89g4e67g960fgae3689a50b5b: Barcus Wroot is my name, Baldur's Gate is my home. Back in the city, I offered my expertise to the highest bidder.
h4475f30fge7f8g4bc1g92d1g5b76bd325cce: I was quite popular too - I'm not picky about my customers.
h48487bc3ga74eg45dagbc38gc47d347910bd: What will you do if Wulbren is dead?
h49618e02g82a7g4290gafe7ga6ca5784145c: I suppose... I suppose I'd be very, very sad.
hb2fd4cf2g1071g434dgb434gdd3f7ccd1b82: Then, after awhile, I'd find whoever killed him and put a smokepowder bomb in their trousers.
h6dff5ccag3273g4967g9890gc262050bfc78: Right. Wulbren's life is at stake. We must focus.
h4657bfaeg1299g408aga54ag9eb7b5bf3d38: If you have a moment, I'd like your opinion on something.
